mapper.select: SELECT id, connection_id AS connectionId, table_name AS tableName, chunk_text AS chunkText, embedding::text AS embedding, status, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime, 1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS similarity FROM text2sql_table_embedding WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
